mission.title: Operation: Remember the Last City
mission.briefing: The Last Forgotten City of Ω-7 is erasing from the historical record at an accelerating rate. As Senior Reality Archivist (Class Ω), your mandate is to restore Memory Integrity from its current critical level of 42.5% to the minimum stability threshold of 85% before the city vanishes permanently from all timeline branches.

emotionIndex.description: Collective emotional state derived from active memory fragments across Sectors 1-6. High despair and fear are accelerating fragmentation.

objectives.detail: Secure MF-2241 (The Last Coronation of Verdana) into the primary archive with ≥ 90% integrity.
Resolve the Verdana Dual-State Paradox to stop the 2,100 fragment/hr drain from Sector 1.
Bring Sector 3 integrity from 34% to ≥ 60% by recovering and reanchoring corrupted fragments.
Silence the Void Core echo cascade (PAR-003) and prevent TL-012 collapse.
Extract coordinates from MF-2229 and MF-2222 to understand the future transmission.
Reconcile the Mira Chen duplicate identity paradox before quantum collapse in Sec-3.

codex: Reality exists only because someone remembers it.
A forgotten name is not merely absent — it unmakes.
The Archivist who remembers saves more than the warrior who fights.
When integrity falls below 50%, even the remembering becomes unstable.
The Loom does not weave futures — it preserves the threads of what was.
